raw_text:
Aisha: David, Sandra — I'm pleased you could join. I believe procurement completed their review?

David: Yes, legal was happy with the data residency clauses. We're ready to sign. The PO number is TN-2025-0892. Contract value is £165,000 for the first year with a renewal clause at year two.

Aisha: Excellent. The signed contract has been received on our end. Implementation will begin August 15th as agreed.

Sandra: We'd like to have the onboarding for our travel admins in the first week of August so they're ready before go-live.

Aisha: Absolutely. I'll schedule that with our onboarding team. You'll get a dedicated customer success manager — I'll introduce you by email today.

David: One more thing. We're expanding further — we expect to add another 100 staff by year end. Can the platform scale?

Aisha: Yes, additional users can be added at any time at the per-user rate. I'll include the scale-up terms in a follow-up note.

Sandra: Brilliant. Looking forward to getting started.

Aisha: Same here. Congratulations — welcome to EAS.
